explanations.1: This checks if a folder doesn't exist by running a shell test command; if the test fails (folder missing), it echoes 'no' which matches the string 'no' on the right, making the condition true.
explanations.5: This checks if a folder exists by running a shell test command; if the test succeeds, it echoes 'yes' which matches the string 'yes' on the right, making the condition true.
